description: 80 m² office in Vasastan, a charming central Stockholm neighborhood. Approx 4,000 SEK/m²/year. Good metro and bus connections.

title: Butik/Kontorslokal Kungsholmen, Stockholm
description: 120 m² street-level commercial space on Kungsholmen. Suitable for retail, office, or beauty business. Approx 3,500 SEK/m²/year.

title: Restauranglokal Stockholm City, 200 m²
description: 200 m² restaurant space in Stockholm City. Approx 1,500 SEK/m²/year. Ready for gastro use.

title: Kontorslokal Stockholm City, 150 m²
description: 150 m² premium office in Stockholm CBD. Approx 6,000 SEK/m²/year. Modern building with all amenities.

title: Restauranglokal Södermalm, 95 m²
description: 95 m² restaurant space in Södermalm, one of Stockholm's trendiest neighborhoods. Ready for gastro use.

title: Lokal Tenstagången, raw space 50-500 m²
description: Raw commercial space of 200 m² along Tenstagången. Affordable suburban location. Can be divided 50-500 m². Suitable for any business type.

title: Kontorslokal Inom tullarna, 75 m²
description: 75 m² office within inner city Stockholm (Inom tullarna). Premium location with 541 offices available in the area. Approx 5,000 SEK/m²/year.

title: Moderne og lyst næringslokale, Westye Egebergs gate, Oslo
description: Modern and bright commercial space renovated in 2022. Main room with two separate offices. Kitchen, toilet, and storage. Large windows with excellent light. Near Vulkan and Mathallen. Heating and hot water included. Available July 1, 2026.

title: Attraktivt næringslokale Majorstuen - frisør/skjønnhet
description: Attractive 60 m² commercial space at Majorstuen, perfect for hairdresser/beauty salon. Ready to use. Rent 33,259 kr/month including common costs. Lease until September 1, 2026.

title: Kontorlokaler Heitmanngården, Oslo Sentrum - 55 m²
description: Office space in Heitmanngården, 2nd floor, 55 m². Total rent 13,750 kr per month. Central Oslo location.

title: Fine kontorlokaler Oslo sentrum, 5. etasje med heis
description: Office space on the 5th floor in central Oslo. 195 m² net / 262 m² gross. Contains 6-7 cell offices, meeting room, and facilities. Elevator access.

title: Showroom/kontor Bygdøy allé - perfekte lysforhold
description: Exclusive showroom/office with perfect lighting. Main showroom approx 30 m² and two smaller offices of 20 and 10 m². Customer parking. Available May 4, 2026.

title: Stilfulle kontorlokaler Oslo sentrum, møblert og klare
description: Move-in ready stylish furnished office spaces in central Oslo. Furnished and ready to use immediately.

title: Næringslokaler vis-a-vis Oslo Met
description: Centrally located commercial premises opposite Oslo Metropolitan University (Oslo Met). Street-level access. Suitable for office, retail, or educational use.

title: Lysaker kontorlokale, halv pris - nær Lysaker stasjon
description: Oslo area's most affordable office space at half price. Located at Vollsveien 2A near Lysaker station. 200 m² office at a promotional rate.

title: Kalbakken - Servering og butikk/kontor
description: Flexible spaces 150-440 m² suitable for restaurant/serving, retail, or office use. Kalbakken area, north Oslo. Multiple configuration options.

title: Næringslokale korttidsleie, Oslo sentrum
description: Commercial space available for short-term lease (1-6 months) from May 1, 2026. Central Oslo location. Flexible terms.
